values.name: kb_search_web
values.description: Search the web via Google Custom Search Engine and return grounded results with snippets and source URLs. Use when the user needs up-to-date information not present in the local knowledge base.
values.inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search query in any language"},"top_k":{"type":"integer","description":"Max results to return (1–10, default 5)"},"lang":{"type":"string","description":"Language hint for results, e.g. lang_ru, lang_en, lang_de"}},"required":["query"]}

values.name: kb_search_local
values.description: Search the local PostgreSQL knowledge base using hybrid vector+BM25 retrieval. Use when the user needs information from uploaded documents or past conversations.
values.inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search query in any language"},"top_k":{"type":"integer","description":"Max chunks to return (default 5)"},"chat_id":{"type":"integer","description":"User chat ID to scope results"}},"required":["query"]}

parameters.query:
WITH
  vec AS (
    SELECT chunk_id, doc_id, section, chunk_text,
           (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS vec_dist
    FROM taris_kb.kb_chunks
    WHERE chat_id = $2
    ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
    LIMIT 20
  ),
  bm25 AS (
    SELECT chunk_id, ts_rank(tsv, plainto_tsquery('simple', $3)) AS rank_bm25
    FROM taris_kb.kb_chunks
    WHERE chat_id = $2
      AND tsv @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', $3)
    LIMIT 20
  ),
  rrf AS (
    SELECT v.chunk_id, v.doc_id, v.section, v.chunk_text,
           (1.0 / (60 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY v.vec_dist)))
         + COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY b.rank_bm25 DESC)), 0) AS rrf_score
    FROM vec v
    LEFT JOIN bm25 b ON b.chunk_id = v.chunk_id
  )
SELECT chunk_id, doc_id, section, chunk_text, rrf_score AS score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT $4

options.queryParams: =["[" + $('Embed Local Query').item.json.embedding.join(",") + "]", {{ $('Route by Tool').item.json.input.chat_id || 0 }}, "{{ $('Route by Tool').item.json.input.query }}", {{ Math.min($('Route by Tool').item.json.input.top_k || 5, 10) }}]

_readme.description: KB - MCP Server Google: exposes two MCP tools over SSE transport at /n8n/mcp/kb-google/sse
_readme.credential_required: KB Postgres (PostgreSQL connection to taris_kb DB)
_readme.setup: 1. Set N8N variables GOOGLE_CSE_KEY + GOOGLE_CSE_CX. 2. Replace REPLACE_WITH_CREDENTIAL_ID with KB Postgres credential ID. 3. Import + activate workflow. 4. Add MCP_REMOTE_URL_GOOGLE to bot.env (optional, if using Google variant).
